channel.title: Projects on ilhamije
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on ilhamije

item.description: Privacy Policy Introduction Thank you for using my software! This document is the main privacy policy for Omni Notes Android and desktop applications. I respects your privacy rights and care about protecting your information collected by my apps. What information are eventually collected No information will be collected by this app. Security of information No data are sold or shared with third party entities or companies. Contact To contact me on topics related to products, privacy policy or in another case, use ilhamije@gmail.
